auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
Sign in once – with an offline token your session will no longer expire every few hours.

1) Open browser devtools (F12) → Network tab.

2) Open the following link in a new tab:
{auth_url}

3) Sign in. The browser will immediately redirect to the DKV dashboard – this is expected.

4) In the Network tab, find a request containing "?code=". Right-click it → Copy → Copy URL.

5) Paste the copied URL here.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
Your DKV session has expired or is no longer valid.

1) Open browser devtools (F12) → Network tab.

2) Open the following link in a new tab:
{auth_url}

3) Sign in. The browser will immediately redirect to the DKV dashboard – this is expected.

4) In the Network tab, find a request containing "?code=". Right-click it → Copy → Copy URL.

5) Paste the copied URL here.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please sign in again and paste the new redirect URL.
error.invalid_token_json: No valid token JSON detected. Paste the full JSON response.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the redirect URL (containing ?code=…) or a token JSON.
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the full redirect URL.
error.state_mismatch: Security check failed (state mismatch). Please restart the sign-in process.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
